opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours book competitors with instant online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered booking widget capturing job type, location, and urgency 24/7.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact confirms zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise leads vanishes with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Integrate AI call logging to auto-capture caller info, job details, and follow-up triggers.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: 112 reviews at 4.8 stars but no review-request patterns or marketing tools detected.
opportunities.observation: Strong reputation is growing only by chance, not through any systematic outreach process.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequence requesting Google reviews and scheduling next maintenance visit.
